Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Nanshan Semiconductor Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Nanshan Semiconductor Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical specimen of an 'electronic component distributor/agent in a downtown office building', mechanically misjudged by the official system as a major semiconductor manufacturing plant. The forensic engine has completely cleared the massive fake consumer electronics foundry system implicated by Apple Inc. at the underlying level. The official industrial and commercial system was obviously intimidated by its extremely hardcore name 'Nanshan Semiconductor' and the leading phrase 'electronic component production' in its license, directly classifying it into 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing'. However, the physical probe and common sense engine immediately launched a dimensionality reduction strike: this is a veteran enterprise established in 2003 with 23 social security employees (proving it is a physically operating team), but its registered address is extremely fatal—'Room 1112, No. 26 Hongwu Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing'. Hongwu Road is located in the extremely prosperous Xinjiekou core business district in Nanjing! On the 11th floor (Room 1112) of a skyscraper in a downtown area where every inch of land is worth its weight in gold, leading 23 white-collar employees to set up lithography machines, clean rooms, and wafer production lines to 'manufacture semiconductors'? This is science-fiction level absurdity. The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is not a semiconductor wafer fab or packaging and testing plant at all. Combined with its official domain name (nscn.com.cn) and a large number of 'sales, import and export business' vocabularies in the latter half of the license, this is an extremely pure 'Semiconductor Distributor & Trading Agency headquartered in a downtown commercial office building'. All 23 of these people are sales, procurement, technical support, and documentation personnel; they only sell chips, they do not make them.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 77)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / SEMICONDUCTOR DISTRIBUTOR & TRADING AGENCY
